extortion.description: The Shively Bros team is on a mission to retain current valued customers and earn new business by providing exceptional value through effective products, outstanding services, and the introduction of new technologies.Shively Bros is dedicated to being a diverse and inclusive company that assists its employees in building wealth and assets equitably. We attribute much of our success to the fact that each of our employee-owners are empowered and driven to provide the best service to our customers. The combination of Shively’s essential elements describe who we are, where we are going, and how we plan to get there.SITE: www.shivelybros.com Address 2919 S Grand Traverse, FlintMichigan, 48507United States
